title: Women unite and empower
description: GEORGE NEWS - In a joint effort to honour...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - In a joint effort to honour Women's Day, the Pacaltsdorp Community Business Association and the Green Garden Foundation hosted a special event themed Heart to Heart Talks.


> The event brought together community members to engage in meaningful discussions and celebrate the contributions of women.


The event highlighted the importance of collaboration and support among women in the community to unite and empower each other.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
